nodes.label: Batch
nodes.description: A batch is a quantity of(semi-)finished products or(raw)material product that have been produced under the same circumstances(e.g. same production location), as specified groups or amounts, within a certain time frame. Every batch can differ in the number or amount of products. Different batches can have varied specifications, e.g., different colors. A batch is identified via a Batch ID.

nodes.label: catenaXId
nodes.description: The fully anonymous Catena-X ID of the batch, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: localIdentifiers
nodes.description: A local identifier enables identification of a part in a specific dataspace, but is not unique in Catena-X dataspace. Multiple local identifiers may exist.

nodes.label: manufacturingInformation
nodes.description: Information from manufacturing process, such as manufacturing date and manufacturing country

nodes.label: partTypeInformation
nodes.description: The part type of which the batch has been instantiated of.

nodes.label: key
nodes.description: The key of a local identifier.

nodes.label: value
nodes.description: The value of an identifier.

nodes.label: date
nodes.description: Timestamp of the manufacturing date as the final step in production process(e.g. final quality check, ready-for-shipment event)

nodes.label: country
nodes.description: Country code where the part was manufactured

nodes.label: manufacturerPartId
nodes.description: Part ID as assigned by the manufacturer of the part. The Part ID identifies the part(as designed)in the manufacturer`s dataspace. The Part ID does not reference a specific instance of a part and thus should not be confused with the serial number or batch number.

nodes.label: nameAtManufacturer
nodes.description: Name of the part as assigned by the manufacturer

nodes.label: LocalIdentifierCharacteristic
nodes.description: A batch may have multiple attributes, which uniquely identify that batch in a specific dataspace(e.g. the manufacturer`s dataspace)

nodes.label: ManufacturingCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic to describe manufacturing related data

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristics of the part type

nodes.label: ValueCharacteristic
nodes.description: The value of an identifier.

nodes.label: PartIdCharacteristic
nodes.description: The part ID is a multi-character string, usually assigned by an ERP system

nodes.label: PartNameCharacteristic
nodes.description: Part Name in string format from the respective system in the value chain

nodes.label: KeyCharacteristic
nodes.description:
The key characteristic of a local identifier. A specific subset of keys is predefined. Custom keys are not allowed. Predefined keys:
- "manufacturerId" - The Business Partner Number(BPN)of the manufacturer. Value: BPN-Nummer
- "batchId" - The identifier of the batch, to which the serialzed part belongs

nodes.label: DateTimeCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes a Property which contains the date and time with an optional timezone.

nodes.label: CountryCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 ? three-letter country codes

nodes.label: KeyValueList
nodes.description: A list of key value pairs for local identifiers, which are composed of a key and a corresponding value.

nodes.label: ManufacturingEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulates the manufacturing relevant attributes

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulation for data related to the part type

nodes.label: KeyTrait
nodes.description: Trait that ensures the usage of predefined keys.

nodes.label: DateTrait
nodes.description: Trait to ensure regular expressions with different date formats.

nodes.label: ProductionCountryCodeTrait
nodes.description: Trait to ensure standard data format for country code

nodes.label: KeyRegularExpression
nodes.description: Constraint that ensures that the predefined keys are used.

nodes.label: DateTimeRegularExpression
nodes.description: Regular Expression to enable UTC and Timezone formats and the possibility to exclude time information.

nodes.label: CountryCodeRegularExpression
nodes.description: Regular Expression that ensures a three-letter code
